title: alyxia ilicifolia subsp. magnifolia
intro: Alyxia ilicifolia subsp. magnifolia, also known as the Queensland pipevine, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as being used as a treatment for skin conditions. Alyxia ilicifolia subsp. magnifolia is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal remedies.
